deletion_policy.subject: client_ids
deletion_policy.description: Rows are client-scoped personal assignment audit events. Metadata currently stores only: source, history_gap, target_client_id, target_trainer_id, invite_id, closed_assignment_count. actor_user_id and trainer_id are nullable FK references and are set null when their auth/trainer rows are deleted. Client deletion purges rows by client_id. Trainer deletion intentionally does not purge live-client assignment history by trainer_id alone. Export should treat rows as part of client account relationship history.
